"; system(cmd.c_str()); }|an authenticated attacker can execute arbitrary commands on the host system through the admin exec interface.|admin command starting with "exec " provided after successful authentication or emergency override.|use a safe execution function like execve with a fixed command list and avoid passing user input directly to system().
